title: tephrosia grandibracteata
intro: Tephrosia grandibracteata, also known as the large-bracted horsefly-pea, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat a range of health issues. The plant's extracts have been found to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia grandibracteata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent.
